items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills
items.title_cn: SkillOpt ：自我发展代理技能的执行策略
items.summary: Agent skills today are hand-crafted, generated one-shot, or evolved through loosely controlled self-revision, none of which behaves like a deep-learning optimizer for the skill, and none of which reliably improves over its starting point under feedback. We argue the skill should instead be trained a...
items.summary_cn: 今天的座席技能是手工制作的，一次性生成的，或者通过松散控制的自我修正来发展的，其中没有一个表现得像该技能的深度学习优化器，也没有一个在反馈的起点上可靠地改进。我们认为，这项技能应该接受培训，...
items.comment: 性能提升显著，能耗和成本呢？多维度的权衡才是真实世界。

items.title: LLMs as Noisy Channels: A Shannon Perspective on Model Capacity and Scaling Laws
items.title_cn: LLMs作为嘈杂的渠道：从Shannon的角度看待模型产能和扩展定律
items.summary: Existing scaling laws for Large Language Models (LLMs), predominantly monotonic power laws, fail to explain emerging non-monotonic phenomena such as catastrophic overtraining and quantization-induced degradation, where performance deteriorates despite increased compute.   We propose the Shannon Scal...
items.summary_cn: 大型语言模型（ LLM ）的现有缩放定律（主要是单调幂定律）无法解释新出现的非单调现象，例如灾难性的过度训练和量化导致的退化，尽管计算量增加，但性能却会恶化。我们提出香农量表...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: From Raw Experience to Skill Consumption: A Systematic Study of Model-Generated Agent Skills
items.title_cn: 从原始经验到技能消耗：模型生成座席技能的系统研究
items.summary: Language agents increasingly improve by reusing \emph{skills} -- structured procedural artifacts distilled from past experience. In particular, \emph{domain-level} and \emph{model-generated} skills are especially promising. They offer fast adaptation within a domain by encoding domain-specific recur...
items.summary_cn: 通过重复使用\ emph {skills} --从过去的经验中提炼的结构化程序工件，语言代理人越来越多地得到改进。特别是\ emph {domain-level}和\ emph {model-generated}技能特别有前途。它们通过编码特定于域的循环来提供域内的快速适应...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation

items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。
